data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Deploys measures to detect and mitigate distributed denial-of-service attacks that could disrupt service availability.
data.technical_spec: Google Shield, TCP/UDP filtering, and regular expression blacklisting.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures that data in transit and at rest is encrypted to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit; AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Increases account security by requiring additional verification steps during login.
data.technical_spec: Integration with Google Authenticator and third-party services for 2FA.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Implements IDS to monitor and analyze network traffic for signs of attempts to compromise the system.
data.technical_spec: Pattern recognition algorithms and anomaly detection software.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular penetration tests and code reviews to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Red team exercises, static and dynamic code analysis tools.
